channel.title: estack — Canadian Mortgage & Finance
channel.description: Practical guides for Canadian homebuyers, mortgage seekers, and real estate investors

item.title: CMI Financial Group Review: Canada's Largest Private Mortgage Lender
item.description: CMI Financial Group is one of Canada's leading private mortgage lenders. Here's who they lend to, what rates look like, and how to apply.

item.title: LeadScout Mortgage Calculator: Get a Rate in 60 Seconds
item.description: LeadScout's mortgage calculator gives Canadian borrowers an instant rate estimate — no paperwork, no broker calls. Here's how it works.

item.title: FindMyRate.ca Review: Compare Canadian Mortgage Rates Instantly
item.description: FindMyRate.ca lets Canadian homebuyers compare mortgage rates from multiple lenders in seconds. Here's how it works and who it's best for.

item.title: Self-Employed Mortgage in Canada: What You Need to Know
item.description: Getting a mortgage when you're self-employed in Canada is harder — but not impossible. Here's what lenders look for and how to qualify.

item.title: Gold vs. Silver Bullion in Canada: What to Compare Before You Buy
item.description: Before choosing gold or silver bullion in Canada, compare premiums, storage needs, liquidity, product format and dealer policies. A practical side-by-side guide.

item.title: Variable vs. Fixed Mortgage in Canada: Which Should You Choose?
item.description: Fixed or variable? The decision depends on your risk tolerance, timeline, and where rates are heading. Here's a practical breakdown for Canadian borrowers.

item.title: Ontario First-Time Home Buyer Guide: Programs, Costs & What to Expect
item.description: Everything Ontario first-time buyers need to know: land transfer tax rebates, the First Home Savings Account, CMHC insurance, and how to navigate your first purchase.

item.title: Private Mortgage Lenders in Ontario: What They Are and When to Use One
item.description: Private mortgage lenders in Ontario fill gaps that banks won't. Here's how they work, what rates look like, and when they make sense.

item.title: Second Mortgages on Investment Properties in Ontario
item.description: Second mortgages on Ontario investment properties can unlock equity without refinancing. Here's how lenders assess them and what to expect.

item.title: Bank Said No? What to Do Next in Canada
item.description: Getting declined by a bank isn't the end of the road. Here are the realistic next steps for Canadian borrowers who don't fit traditional lending criteria.

item.title: Bank of Canada Rate Decision: What It Means for Your Mortgage
item.description: How Bank of Canada rate decisions affect variable-rate mortgages, HELOCs, and whether fixed rates are likely to follow.

item.title: How to Improve Your Credit Score in Canada Before Applying for a Mortgage
item.description: A higher credit score means better mortgage rates and more lender options. Here are the most effective steps Canadian borrowers can take before applying.
